title: Invisible Armor Stands and Item Frames│隱形盔甲架與展示框
description: Invisibility potions can now make item frames and armor stands invisible when smashed.│隱形藥水碎裂時會使盔甲架與展示框隱形。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
When a splash or lingering invisibility potion breaks and the potion inside is spread, it makes item frames and armor stands within 4 blocks invisible; when a non-effective potion breaks, it reappears.│當噴濺或滯留的隱形藥水碎裂且其中的藥水散布開來時，使4格內的物品框和盔甲架隱形；無效果的藥水碎裂時，其重新顯現。
